name: Ulanzi L023 40W Pro Portable LED Video Light
description: High-brightness Bi-Color COB lamp beads provide constant output. In overclocking mode, the power can reach up to 50W.

features.Key Features:: High-brightness Bi-Color COB lamp beads provide constant output. In overclocking mode, the power can reach up to 50W. | Weighing just 490g, it's palm-sized and easy to hold. | Built-in 3400mAh battery, with DC and Type-C charging ports, supports 65W PD fast charging. | Color temperature ranging from 2500-6500k, CRI reaches 95+. | It comes with 8 preset lighting scene effects.
features.Specifications:: Model: L023 40W Pro | Dimensions (without reflector): 10.5 x 8.5 x 8.5 cm | Weight (without reflector): 490 g | Lamp Beads: Bi-color COB lamp bead | Color Rendering Index (CRI): ≥ 95 | Color Temperature (CCT): 2500K-6500K | Lumen Output (with reflector): 13150 lux (at 6500K, 0.5 meters) | Beam Angle: 120° | Charging Port: DC 19V/3.4A, Type-C PD 65W | Power Output (Normal Mode): 40W | Max Output (Overclock Mode): 50W | Max Brightness Runtime (50W): 50 minutes | Max Brightness Runtime (40W): ≥ 70 minutes | Min Brightness Runtime: ≥ 180 minutes | Battery: 14.8V/3400mAh (50.3Wh) | Charging Time: Approximately 3 hours
features.What's in the box?: Packing List: | 40W Pro Light * 1 | Reflector * 1 | Diffusion Dome * 1 | Velvet Bag * 1 | User Manual * 1
